Release.ReleaseNotes: Added club image to the Event Setup banner Improved the "Run WSG Client First Time" batch file to possibly remove the continuous SmartScreen prompt Setup Wizard step for DPHX migration hidden when not possible

Release.ReleaseTitle: Add ons installation improvements and other fixes
Release.ReleaseNotes: Full support for custom destination folder per new add-on to install Even better support for packages installed using junctions / links (addons linker) Fixed map image scaling issue Tentative fix for some of the modal popup scaling issue

Added new drag and drop zone feature When manually loading a PLN file, read the departure airfield and runway directly Fixed small regression: bring back the ability to drag and drop links directly from Discord (for PLN and WPR)
This is the initial release of the WSG Client desktop app.
